CustomField.description: Number of Business Days in Current Status
CustomField.formula: (5 * ( FLOOR( ( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7 ) ) + MIN( 5, MOD( TODAY() - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - (5 * ( FLOOR( ( DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8) ) / 7)) + MIN( 5, MOD( DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) - DATE( 1900, 1, 8), 7 ) ) ) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2020-10-12"), today() > DATEVALUE("2020-10-12")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2021-12-27"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-12-27")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2021-12-28"), today() > DATEVALUE("2021-12-28")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-02-21"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-02-21")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-04-15"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-04-15")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-05-23"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-05-23")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-06-24"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-06-24")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-07-01"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-07-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-08-01"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-08-01")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-09-05"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-09-05")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-09-30"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-09-30")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-10-10"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-10-10")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-11-11"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-11-11")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-12-26"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-12-26")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2022-12-27"), today() > DATEVALUE("2022-12-27")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-01-02"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-01-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-02-20"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-02-20")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-04-07"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-04-07")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-04-10"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-04-10")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-05-22"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-05-22")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-07-03"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-07-03")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-08-07"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-08-07")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-09-04"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-09-04")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-10-02"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-10-02")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-10-09"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-10-09")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-11-13"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-11-13")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-12-25"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-12-25")),1,0) - IF(AND(DATEVALUE(Insolvency_Status_Last_Changed__c) < DATEVALUE("2023-12-26"), today() > DATEVALUE("2023-12-26")),1,0)
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Number of Business Days in Current Status
CustomField.label: Number Of Days In Current Status
